text: I feel as though I am wandering through a modern space dedicated to the pursuit of knowledge, perhaps a place for research and experimentation. The glass walls and minimal décor evoke a sense of anticipation and curiosity—what new ideas might be incubating behind these transparent barriers? The prominent 'R+D' display reinforces the sense that I am among minds striving to question, to create, to push boundaries. I feel both inspired and slightly humbled, aware of the ceaseless quest for understanding all around me.
